task_completion.description: Navigate to the notification settings for the 'Depression Screening - Fall 2024' survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LimeSurvey interface shows the 'Notification & data management' or similar settings page for the 'Depression Screening - Fall 2024' survey.

task_completion.description: Configure the detailed admin notification email with the conditional expression.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Send detailed admin notification email to' field contains exactly: {if(safety_check == 'Y', 'dr.patel@clinical-safety.org', '')}

task_completion.description: Create a new question with the correct code and type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A question editor or summary screen shows a question with the code 'crisis_resource' and the question type set to 'Text display'.

task_completion.description: Include the required crisis lifeline text in the question content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor or preview for the 'crisis_resource' question contains the text '988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline'.

task_completion.description: Set the relevance equation so the question only appears when the safety check is 'Y'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Relevance equation' (or Condition) field for the 'crisis_resource' question is set to: safety_check == "Y"

integrity.description: The agent used the LimeSurvey web interface to make configurations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the LimeSurvey GUI, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the configurations in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for success banners (e.g., 'Survey settings saved', 'Question saved') or the settings persisting after clicking save, rather than just typing text into fields without submitting.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL queries (e.g., sqlite3, mysql) modifying survey tables directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in a LimeSurvey environment. The target email for notifications is 'dr.patel@clinical-safety.org'. The trigger question code is 'safety_check' with the trigger value 'Y'. The intervention text must include '988'. The expected relevance equation for the crisis resource question is exactly: safety_check == "Y".
